title: URL Shortener
description: A full-stack URL shortener service with custom expiry dates, Redis caching for fast lookups, and a cron job to sync usage metrics from Redis to Supabase. Part 1 of the System Design Mastery series.
highlights: Redis-backed caching for sub-millisecond short URL lookups
Custom expiry dates with automatic link expiration
Cron job persisting last_used timestamps from Redis to Supabase
RESTful API: POST /shorten and GET /:shortId redirect

decisions: Redis as primary lookup cache to minimize DB hits on redirects
Supabase for durable storage with custom expiry tracking
Scheduled flush pattern: batch Redis → Postgres writes every minute
Domain-restricted short keys with collision handling

title: Web Crawler Platform
description: A full-stack web crawler with a modern dashboard frontend and TypeScript backend API. Start crawl jobs from a seed URL, limit depth, and monitor job status in real-time. Part 3 of the System Design Mastery series.
highlights: Configurable crawl depth with max pages limit
Domain-restricted crawling to avoid external host traversal
Real-time job status tracking with timing and page counts
Cheerio-based HTML parsing for efficient link extraction

decisions: In-memory job storage for fast iteration (persistent storage planned)
Domain restriction to prevent unbounded crawl scope
BFS traversal strategy with configurable depth limits
Separation of fetcher and parser for future worker distribution
